name: Petits Bateaux Dans La Sauce (Little Boats in Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients: flour, salt, cream of tartar, and baking soda.
2. Blend in the lard to form a coarse mixture.
3. Gradually add milk until the dough is smooth but not too sticky.
4. Roll the dough into a sheet that is 1/4 inch thick.
5. Cut the dough into rectangles measuring 4 inches by 2 inches.
6. Pinch the ends of each rectangle to form shapes resembling small boats.
7. Place the pastries in an oven preheated to 350°F.
8. In a separate dish, combine the sauce ingredients and place it back in the oven.
9. When the pastries are done baking, remove them from the oven and serve with the sauce.
SOURCE: A Taste of Acadie by Marielle Cormier-Boudreau
